PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?musician ?name WHERE {
  VALUES ?state {
    wd:Q99 wd:Q1147 wd:Q1317
  }
  ?musician wdt:P106 wd:Q639669 .
  ?musician wdt:P19 ?birthPlace .
  ?birthPlace wdt:P131 * ?state .
  ?musician p:P166 ?awardStatement .
  ?awardStatement ps:P166 ?awardCategory .
  ?awardStatement pq:P585 ?date .
  ?awardCategory wdt:P179 wd:Q41254 .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2022"))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?musician rdfs:label ?name
    FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
  }
}
LIMIT 50
